title: Real-Time WEATHER Mobile APP
description: I built a sleek, responsive weather app using Flutter and Dart, featuring real-time updates, hourly/daily forecasts, and live city search, powered by the OpenWeatherMap API.

title: Avurudu Nakath (New Year Amulet) Mobile App
description: Avurudu Nakath 2025 is a Sinhala & Tamil New Year app with all key Nakath times, ritual details, and push notifications to keep you updated on every important moment.

title: Resume Maker Mobile App
description: I built a modern, user-friendly Resume Maker app using Flutter and Dart to simplify resume creation for students, job seekers, and professionals. It features 4 unique templates, live previews, a step-by-step form, social media integration, and high-quality PDF export—all in a responsive, Material 3 design.

title: EduLink – a peer tutoring platform
description: EDULINK is a group project web app that connects students and tutors for peer-to-peer learning. Students can enroll in courses and request classes, while tutors manage content and schedules. Admins oversee users and platform activity.

title: BloodHope Mobile App UI/UX Design
description: BloodHope—a mobile app UI/UX design built in Figma to simplify blood donations. It includes a splash screen, auth pages, home with stats, campaign map, donation history, add campaign, and profile with QR code

title: Sample UI/UX Design for UberEats Mobile App
description: A modern and intuitive UI/UX design for the UberEats mobile app, focusing on seamless food ordering and delivery experience.

title: Serandib Travel Website UI/UX Design
description: A travel website UI/UX design for Serandib, providing a user-friendly interface for booking and exploring travel packages.

title: Sample UI/UX Design for RHODA.LIFE
description: A clean and elegant UI/UX design for RHODA.LIFE, focusing on lifestyle and wellness content.

title: Shop Me Company Website UI/UX Design
description: A responsive e-commerce website UI/UX design for Shop Me, enhancing the online shopping experience.

title: Brew Mate SL Shop Mobile App UI/UX Design
description: A mobile app UI/UX design for Brew Mate SL, making coffee ordering and delivery easy and enjoyable.

title: Calculator Mobile Apps for Android & iOS (Flutter & Swift)
description: Cross-platform calculator apps built with Flutter and Swift for Android and iOS devices.

title: SL Teach Company Receipt System UI/UX Design
description: A digital receipt system UI/UX design for SL Teach Company, streamlining business transactions.
